hooks.prompt: If this session had 3 or more distinct steps (file edits, commands, investigations), generate OSOP session logs. Create sessions/YYYY-MM-DD-<short-desc>.osop with workflow definition and sessions/YYYY-MM-DD-<short-desc>.osoplog.yaml with execution record. Follow the format from /osop-log skill. Skip silently if the session was trivial (simple questions, single-file reads, one-liners).
